query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A black and white landscape photograph of an expansive desert plain covered with sparse, low-lying brush and dry shrubs, stretching toward receding mountain ridges under a wide, overcast sky with soft cloud layers.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white landscape photograph rendered with muted, washed-out tones and oppressively low contrast, depicting an expansive desert plain covered with sparse, low-lying brush and dry shrubs stretching toward receding mountain ridges under a wide, overcast sky, where crushed midtones and weak tonal separation create a heavy, suffocating atmosphere across the entire frame.
